name: reader_banner
description: Example public-reader extension that adds a dismissible notice with a hook, CSS, and JavaScript.
settings_summary: This example shows how an extension can enhance public documentation without editing a core template. It registers its own assets and appends a notice through the reader content hook.
settings_notes: The notice is appended below rendered documentation pages and can be dismissed in the browser.
Its stylesheet and JavaScript are served from this extension's own directory.
This package is disabled by default and is safe to remove from a production deployment after using it as a reference.

settings.label: Notice message
settings.default: This documentation is maintained by the platform team.

settings.label: Accent color
settings.description: Used for the banner border, icon, and subtle background tint.

settings.label: Icon
settings.description: Choose the visual cue shown before the message.

settings.label: Location
settings.description: Choose where the banner is inserted on each page.

settings.label: Page scope
settings.description: Limit which public pages receive the banner.

settings.label: Allow visitors to dismiss
settings.description: Show a close button and remember the visitor's choice in their browser.
